title: hieracium inuloides subsp. polycomatum
intro: Hieracium inuloides subsp. polycomatum, also known as hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Hieracium inuloides subsp. polycomatum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for treating skin conditions and injuries. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
